backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the barbershop app, managing services, staff, business hours, contact info, and appointment requests via CRUD operations using Map and List data structures.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old puzzle-game actor state into the new barbershop actor state, initializing empty collections for services, staff, and appointments.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping each barbershop UI feature (hero, services, team, gallery, contact/booking) to their implementing source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key details of every component, hook, and config file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file defining Tailwind base styles and CSS custom property tokens for light and dark color themes using OKLCH values.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Sharp Cuts Barbershop SPA, setting the page title, SEO meta description, and mounting the React app root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full single-page barbershop layout by rendering Navigation, HeroSection, ServicesSection, TeamSection, GallerySection, ContactSection, and a branded footer.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact and booking section component that fetches and displays contact info and business hours from the backend (with fallbacks), and provides an appointment request form with submission state handling.
frontend/src/components/GallerySection.t: Renders a 4-image gallery grid for the barbershop with hover overlays and a lightbox modal for full-size image viewing.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with background image, barbershop branding, CTA buttons for booking/services, and summary stats.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, active section tracking, smooth-scroll links, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
Displays a grid of barbershop services fetched via useServices hook, falling back to hardcoded data, with loading skeletons and price/duration details.
frontend/src/components/TeamSection.tsx: Displays staff member cards with photo, name, role, and bio fetched via useStaff hook, falling back to hardcoded staff data with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both authenticated (Internet Identity) and anonymous access, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login/logout state, AuthClient creation, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching services, staff, business hours, and contact info from the backend actor, plus a mutation hook for submitting appointment requests.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up a dark charcoal/gold barbershop theme using Tailwind CSS, custom CSS variables, and utility classes for typography, colors, buttons, and card styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with barbershop-specific gold/charcoal color tokens, custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the barbershop website's version, implemented features, required image assets, and architectural notes for build planning.
